import re

def perceive(observation_text: str) -> str:
    # Use a list to store output fragments that will be ordered later
    perceived_features = []

    # Initialize agent position and status
    agent_x, agent_y = None, None
    agent_pos_reliable = False
    agent_class = None
    agent_hp_current, agent_hp_max = None, None
    
    # Initialize full status line and a temporary class variable from it
    agent_full_status_line = None
    agent_class_from_status_line = None 
    
    # Initialize identified inventory items list. This will be populated from auxiliary_observation.
    identified_inventory_items_chars = set()
    identified_items_full_desc = [] # Store full descriptions for printing
    
    inventory_match = None # Initialize inventory_match for later use in final block
    
    items_on_ground_explicit = []
    items_on_ground_inferred_from_message = [] 
    items_in_inventory_mentioned_in_message = [] 
    items_to_pickup = [] # This will be the filtered list of truly pickable items

    # Initialize message classifications
    message_classifications = []

    # Initialize character reset event flag
    character_reset_event = False

    # --- Raw message content ---
    message_match = re.search(r"message:\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n\ncursor:|\n\nmap:|$)", observation_text)
    message_content = ""
    if message_match:
        message_content = message_match.group(1).strip()

    # --- Auxiliary Observation parsing ---
    aux_obs_content = None 
    # Updated regex to handle different auxiliary_observation formats: XML-like tags, "auxiliary_observation:\n", and "========== Start of Auxilliary Observation ==========\n"
    # It also handles different end markers: "\n\n", "\Z", "</auxiliary_observation>", and "========== End of Auxilliary Observation ==========\n"
    aux_obs_match = re.search(r"(?:<auxiliary_observation>|auxiliary_observation:\n|========== Start of Auxilliary Observation ==========\n)([\s\S]*?)(?=\n\n|\Z|</auxiliary_observation>|========== End of Auxilliary Observation ==========\n)", observation_text)
    
    if aux_obs_match:
        aux_obs_content = aux_obs_match.group(1).strip()
        
        if "You died in your previous attempt and have respawned as a new character" in aux_obs_content:
            character_reset_event = True

        inventory_match = re.search(r"inventory:\n([\s\S]+)", aux_obs_content)
        if inventory_match:
            inventory_items = inventory_match.group(1).strip().split('\n')
            for item in inventory_items:
                item_stripped = item.strip()
                # Match identified items, with or without BUC/charges
                match_ident = re.match(r"^([a-zA-Z]): .*$", item_stripped)
                if match_ident:
                    # For filtering, we still just need the character.
                    identified_inventory_items_chars.add(match_ident.group(1))
                    identified_items_full_desc.append(item_stripped)

    is_agent_dead = False
    if "Killed by" in message_content or "You die" in message_content or "You are dead" in message_content:
        is_agent_dead = True
    
    is_active_prompt_found = False
    turn_consumed = True # Default assumption for non-prompt messages and actions

    # --- Agent Status Line ---
    agent_full_status_match = re.search(r"Agent the (\w+)\s+St:.*?HP:(\d+)\((\d+)\).*?$", observation_text, re.DOTALL)
    if agent_full_status_match:
        agent_full_status_line = agent_full_status_match.group(0).strip()
        
        agent_hp_current = int(agent_full_status_match.group(2))
        agent_hp_max = int(agent_full_status_match.group(3))
        
        agent_class_from_status_line = agent_full_status_match.group(1) 

    # --- Agent Position and Class ---
    # Cursor position needed for agent position best estimate
    cursor_x, cursor_y = None, None
    cursor_match = re.search(r"cursor:\s*\n.*?\(x=(\d+), y=(\d+)\)", observation_text, re.DOTALL)
    if cursor_match:
        cursor_x = int(cursor_match.group(1))
        cursor_y = int(cursor_match.group(2))

    if not is_agent_dead and not character_reset_event: 
        agent_pos_match_class = re.search(r"Yourself a (\w+)\n\(x=(\d+), y=(\d+)\)", observation_text)
        if agent_pos_match_class:
            agent_class = agent_pos_match_class.group(1)
            agent_x = int(agent_pos_match_class.group(2))
            agent_y = int(agent_pos_match_class.group(3))
            agent_pos_reliable = True
        else: # 'Yourself a [class]' not found (e.g., during active prompt)
            # Re-check message_classifications after initial classifications are populated
            # This ensures `is_active_prompt_found` is accurate based on full context.
            # Populating message_classifications below first, then evaluating this block.
            pass # Defer this until message_classifications is processed

    # --- Message Classifications (moved up to ensure is_active_prompt_found is ready early) ---
    if "What do you want to use or apply?" in message_content:
        is_active_prompt_found = True
        message_classifications.append("active_prompt (type: apply_item_selection_prompt)")
        turn_consumed = False
    elif re.search(r"In what direction\?", message_content):
        is_active_prompt_found = True
        message_classifications.append("active_prompt (type: directional_input_prompt)")
        turn_consumed = False
    elif re.search(r"What do you want to drink\? \[([a-zA-Z*? ]+)\]", message_content):
        is_active_prompt_found = True
        message_classifications.append("active_prompt (type: quaff_item_selection_prompt)")
        turn_consumed = False
    elif re.search(r"\[[ynqYNQ]+\]", message_content):
        is_active_prompt_found = True
        message_classifications.append("active_prompt (type: yes_no_quit_prompt)")
        turn_consumed = False 
    elif re.search(r"What do you want to zap\? \[([a-zA-Z*? ]+)\]", message_content):
        is_active_prompt_found = True
        message_classifications.append("active_prompt (type: zap_item_selection_prompt)")
        turn_consumed = False
    
    # Classify other specific messages that are not prompts
    if not is_active_prompt_found:
        if "You can't go down here" in message_content or "The stairs are solidly fixed to the floor" in message_content:
             message_classifications.append("blocked_stairs_message")
        if "Never mind." in message_content:
             message_classifications.append("action_cancelled_message")
        if "What?" in message_content or "Unknown command" in message_content or "I don't understand that." in message_content or "You can't do that." in message_content or "Your previous output did not contain a valid action. Retry" in message_content:
             message_classifications.append("invalid_action_message")
             turn_consumed = False 
    
    # If no specific classification has been added, and no prompt, and no item-on-ground type message, default to general_status_update
    if not message_classifications:
        message_classifications.append("general_status_update")

    # Re-evaluate Agent Position and Class, now that is_active_prompt_found is set.
    # Note: agent_x, agent_y, and agent_pos_reliable should be stable and only
    # reliably true if 'Yourself a [class]' is found or if not a prompt AND cursor is present.
    if not is_agent_dead and not character_reset_event: 
        if not agent_pos_reliable and cursor_x is not None and cursor_y is not None and not is_active_prompt_found:
            agent_x = cursor_x
            agent_y = cursor_y
            agent_pos_reliable = True
        
        # If agent_class wasn't set by "Yourself a [class]", try to set it from the status line.
        if not agent_class and agent_class_from_status_line:
            agent_class = agent_class_from_status_line
    else: # Agent dead or reset
        if agent_class_from_status_line: # Even if dead or reset, we might know the class from the status line
            agent_class = agent_class_from_status_line


    # --- Map and Visible Stairs parsing ---
    map_content = ""
    map_match = re.search(r"map:\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n\nAgent the \w+|$)", observation_text)
    if map_match:
        map_content = map_match.group(1).strip()
    
    # --- Items on Ground and Inventory from Message ---
    # Identify items explicitly on the ground (via "You see here:")
    you_see_here_match = re.search(r"You see here:\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n\ncursor:|\n\nmap:|\n\nAgent the \w+|$)", observation_text)
    chars_on_ground_explicit = set() # To help filter inferred items later
    items_on_ground_by_char = {} # char -> full_description
    if you_see_here_match:
        ground_content = you_see_here_match.group(1).strip()
        if ground_content:
            ground_item_matches = re.findall(r"([a-zA-Z]) - ([^\.\n]+)", ground_content)
            for char, desc in ground_item_matches:
                full_item_desc = f"{char} - {desc.strip()}"
                items_on_ground_explicit.append(full_item_desc)
                chars_on_ground_explicit.add(char)
                items_on_ground_by_char[char] = full_item_desc
        
    # Extract items mentioned in the message and infer their location.
    is_invalid_action_message = "invalid_action_message" in message_classifications
    is_prompt = any(cls.startswith("active_prompt") for cls in message_classifications)

    message_item_matches = []
    if message_content and not is_prompt and not is_invalid_action_message: 
        message_item_matches = re.findall(r"([a-zA-Z]) - ([^\.\n]+)", message_content)
        
        for char, desc in message_item_matches:
            candidate_item = f"{char} - {desc.strip()}"
            
            # Priority: 1. In identified inventory (from aux_obs)
            if char in identified_inventory_items_chars:
                items_in_inventory_mentioned_in_message.append(candidate_item)
            # Priority: 2. Explicitly on the ground (from "You see here:")
            elif char in chars_on_ground_explicit:
                pass # Already captured in items_on_ground_explicit
            # Priority: 3. Inferred to be on the ground (if not 1 or 2)
            else:
                items_on_ground_inferred_from_message.append(candidate_item)
                items_on_ground_by_char[char] = candidate_item # Add to our descriptive map

    # Building the final `items_to_pickup` list by strictly filtering for items not in inventory
    # and ensuring uniqueness.
    potential_pickup_items_raw = []
    
    for item_desc in items_on_ground_explicit:
        char = item_desc[0]
        if char not in identified_inventory_items_chars:
            potential_pickup_items_raw.append(item_desc)
            
    for item_desc in items_on_ground_inferred_from_message:
        char = item_desc[0]
        if char not in identified_inventory_items_chars:
            potential_pickup_items_raw.append(item_desc)

    items_to_pickup = sorted(list(dict.fromkeys(potential_pickup_items_raw))) # Deduplicate and sort

    any_items_to_pickup_on_ground = bool(items_to_pickup)
    
    # Final message classification check: Add items_on_ground_message if items were found on the ground
    if (items_on_ground_explicit or items_on_ground_inferred_from_message) and "invalid_action_message" not in message_classifications \
       and not is_prompt and "blocked_stairs_message" not in message_classifications and "action_cancelled_message" not in message_classifications:
        if "general_status_update" in message_classifications:
            message_classifications.remove("general_status_update")
        message_classifications.insert(0, "items_on_ground_message")


    # --- Stairs Status and Suggested Action ---
    known_stairs_down_location = (26, 10) # Fixed in world knowledge

    stairs_present_at_down_stairs_location = (agent_x == known_stairs_down_location[0] and agent_y == known_stairs_down_location[1]) if agent_pos_reliable else False
    
    overall_stairs_status = ""
    suggested_stairs_action = ""

    stairs_explicitly_blocked_by_message = "blocked_stairs_message" in message_classifications

    if stairs_present_at_down_stairs_location:
        descent_blocked = stairs_explicitly_blocked_by_message 
        description_suffix = ""
        
        if descent_blocked: 
            if "You can't go down here" in message_content:
                description_suffix = "due to message 'You can't go down here'."
            elif "The stairs are solidly fixed to the floor" in message_content:
                description_suffix = "due to message 'The stairs are solidly fixed to the floor'."
        
        if descent_blocked:
            overall_stairs_status = f"Stairs descent status: Blocked {description_suffix} The stairs are currently impassable."
            suggested_stairs_action = "Suggested action: None (stairs are blocked)."
        else:
            overall_stairs_status = f"Stairs descent status: Potentially traversable (agent at stairs location)."
            if any_items_to_pickup_on_ground: # Use the proper boolean generated earlier
                suggested_stairs_action = "Suggested action: Pickup items on the ground before attempting to descend stairs."
            else: 
                suggested_stairs_action = "Suggested action: down (to descend the stairs)."
    else:
        if agent_pos_reliable:
             overall_stairs_status = f"Stairs descent status: Not at the known down stairs location {known_stairs_down_location}."
        else:
             overall_stairs_status = "Stairs descent status: Not reliably determined (agent position unknown)."
    

    # --- Visible Points of Interest ---
    visible_points_of_interest = []
    if map_content and agent_pos_reliable:
        map_lines = map_content.split('\n')
        map_height = len(map_lines)
        map_width = len(map_lines[0]) if map_height > 0 else 0

        # Define character mapping for common POIs and non-POI terrain
        char_descriptions = {
            '#': "Wall",
            '-': "Horizontal wall",
            '|': "Vertical wall",
            '+': "Closed door",
            '.': "Floor",
            ' ': "Open door or empty space",
            '<': "Up stairs",
            '>': "Down stairs",
            '{': "Fountain or Lava", # Could be either based on context
            '~': "Moat/Water",
            '$': "Gold on floor",
            '^': "Trap",
            '_': "Altar",
            '=': "Ring or Amulet on floor", # Assuming typical Nethack symbols
            '(': "Weapon on floor",
            '[': "Armor on floor",
            '%': "Food on floor",
            '?': "Scroll on floor",
            '/': "Wand on floor",
            '!': "Potion on floor",
            '*': "Gem/Rock on floor",
            '`': "Open door", # Sometimes displayed as ` when open.
            '\\' : "Amulet or ring on floor", # Amulet
            ',': "Gold or other valuable on floor", # Gem, rock, or nugget/pile
            '0': "Projectile on floor", # Dart, arrow, bolt, etc.
            'F': "Fountain", # Explicitly a fountain
            'g': "A gem or rock", # If 'g' is observed on map and not on ground list elsewhere, it's a generic item.
            'd': "Closed door", # common char for doors, though it can also be an item.
            'h': "A tool or horn", # A tool or horn
            'e': "An edible item", # edible item
            'f': "A weapon or scroll", # A weapon or scroll, such as a horn or feather
            'i': "An item", # general item
            'l': "A potion or scroll",
            'n': "A ring or amulet"
        }

        # Terrain characters that usually aren't "points of interest" to avoid spamming
        non_poi_chars = {'.', '-', '|', ' ', '#', '---'}
        
        # Populate item descriptions from detailed ground observations
        for item_desc in items_on_ground_explicit + items_on_ground_inferred_from_message:
            char = item_desc[0]
            desc = item_desc[4:].strip() # "X - description" -> "description"
            # Prioritize the descriptive name from messages for items on the ground
            char_descriptions[char] = desc
        
        # Iterate over the map relative to agent's position
        # Assuming agent's position @ is at relative (cursor_x, cursor_y) in map
        # map_start_x and map_start_y are the top-left corner of the visible map section
        # The map lines are directly indexed by y, and map_line[x] for x.
        
        # Determine the top-left corner of the *observed* map section, not absolute map
        # For simplicity, we just use the cursor position as the center of perception,
        # but the map provided is typically a fixed window around the agent.
        # So we can iterate the entire map_content and calculate absolute coordinates
        # based on the assumption that agent_x, agent_y is where '@' is.
        # This makes relative_x, relative_y correspond to (x,y) if agent_x,agent_y were (0,0) in map_content.
        
        # The agent's '@' symbol is at (agent_x, agent_y)
        # The map content *itself* must be parsed relative to the agent.
        # Find '@' in map_content
        agent_map_relative_x, agent_map_relative_y = None, None
        for r_y, line in enumerate(map_lines):
            try:
                r_x = line.index('@')
                agent_map_relative_x, agent_map_relative_y = r_x, r_y
                break
            except ValueError:
                continue

        if agent_map_relative_x is not None and agent_map_relative_y is not None:
            # Map symbol coordinates in observation text are relative to this '@' on the map.
            # Convert them to absolute game world coordinates.
            for y_offset, line in enumerate(map_lines):
                for x_offset, char in enumerate(line):
                    # Calculate absolute coordinates
                    abs_x = agent_x + (x_offset - agent_map_relative_x)
                    abs_y = agent_y + (y_offset - agent_map_relative_y)

                    # Skip characters that are part of the self-description or are common terrain non-POIs
                    if char == '@' or char in non_poi_chars:
                        continue
                    
                    # Special handling for "---" which can be lava
                    if char == '-' and x_offset + 2 < len(line) and line[x_offset+1] == '-' and line[x_offset+2] == '-':
                        # This forms '---', treat it as Lava
                        current_char_desc = char_descriptions.get('---', "Lava")
                        if "Lava" not in non_poi_chars: # Ensure Lava isn't explicitly excluded by policy in non_poi_chars
                            # Only add the first character of '---' to avoid duplicates
                            if not any(f"Lava at (x={abs_x}, y={abs_y})" in existing_poi for existing_poi in visible_points_of_interest):
                                visible_points_of_interest.append(f"{current_char_desc} ('{char}{char}{char}') at (x={abs_x}, y={abs_y})")
                        continue # Skip other two '-' in '---' during next iteration
                    
                    if char == '}': # Could be Fountain or Lava, use descriptive char_descriptions
                        current_char_desc = char_descriptions.get(char, "Fountain or Lava")
                        visible_points_of_interest.append(f"{current_char_desc} ('{char}') at (x={abs_x}, y={abs_y})")
                    elif char == '<':
                        current_char_desc = char_descriptions.get(char, "Up stairs")
                        visible_points_of_interest.append(f"{current_char_desc} ('{char}') at (x={abs_x}, y={abs_y})")
                    elif char == '>':
                        current_char_desc = char_descriptions.get(char, "Down stairs")
                        visible_points_of_interest.append(f"{current_char_desc} ('{char}') at (x={abs_x}, y={abs_y})")
                    elif char in char_descriptions:
                        current_char_desc = char_descriptions[char]
                        # For generic 'item on floor' types, ensure we don't accidentally pick up a char that is actually part of a complex wall character, etc.
                        # Also, if it's an item on the ground, and we already know its descriptive name from the message parser, use that.
                        if char.isalpha() and char in items_on_ground_by_char:
                            visible_points_of_interest.append(f"{items_on_ground_by_char[char]} at (x={abs_x}, y={abs_y})")
                        else:
                            visible_points_of_interest.append(f"{current_char_desc} ('{char}') at (x={abs_x}, y={abs_y})")
                    else:
                        # Fallback for characters not explicitly described
                        if char not in non_poi_chars and not char.isspace(): # Exclude explicit non-POI chars and whitespace
                            visible_points_of_interest.append(f"Unknown character ('{char}') at (x={abs_x}, y={abs_y})")
        
        visible_points_of_interest = sorted(list(set(visible_points_of_interest))) # Deduplicate and sort

    # --- Prompt-specific details ---
    prompt_details = [] 
    if "active_prompt (type: apply_item_selection_prompt)" in message_classifications:
        choices_match = re.search(r"\[([a-zA-Z*? ]+)\]", message_content)
        if choices_match:
            prompt_details.append(f"Environment is prompting for an item selection for the 'apply' action from inventory choices: [{choices_match.group(1).strip()}].")
        else:
            prompt_details.append("Environment is prompting for an item selection for the 'apply' action.")
    elif "active_prompt (type: directional_input_prompt)" in message_classifications:
        prompt_details.append("Environment is prompting for directional input.")
    elif "active_prompt (type: quaff_item_selection_prompt)" in message_classifications:
        choices_match = re.search(r"\[([a-zA-Z*? ]+)\]", message_content)
        if choices_match: 
            prompt_details.append(f"Environment is prompting for an item selection for the 'quaff' action from inventory choices: [{choices_match.group(1).strip()}].")
        else:
            prompt_details.append("Environment is prompting for an item selection for the 'quaff' action.")
    elif "active_prompt (type: zap_item_selection_prompt)" in message_classifications:
        choices_match = re.search(r"\[([a-zA-Z*? ]+)\]", message_content)
        if choices_match: 
            prompt_details.append(f"Environment is prompting for an item selection for the 'zap' action from inventory choices: [{choices_match.group(1).strip()}].")
        else:
            prompt_details.append("Environment is prompting for an item selection for the 'zap' action.")
    elif "active_prompt (type: yes_no_quit_prompt)" in message_classifications:
        prompt_details.append(f"Environment is presenting a Yes/No/Quit prompt: '{message_content.strip()}'")


    # Rebuilding perceived_features for correct ordering
    final_perceived_features = []
    
    # Raw message content first
    final_perceived_features.append(f"Raw message content: {message_content}")

    # Auxiliary observation and character status
    if aux_obs_match:
        final_perceived_features.append("Auxiliary observation section present.")
        if character_reset_event:
            final_perceived_features.append("Character status: Respawned as a new character (death in previous attempt detected).")
        
        # Check if an inventory section was found within aux_obs_content
        if inventory_match: 
            if identified_items_full_desc:
                final_perceived_features.append(f"Identified inventory items (from auxiliary_observation): {'; '.join(identified_items_full_desc)}")
            else:
                final_perceived_features.append("Auxiliary observation contained an inventory section, but no identified items were found.")
        else: 
            final_perceived_features.append("Auxiliary observation section present, but no inventory subsection found.")
    else:
        final_perceived_features.append("No auxiliary_observation section found in the raw observation.")
    
    if is_agent_dead:
        final_perceived_features.append("Agent status: dead (death message detected).")

    # Agent status line and HP
    if agent_full_status_line:
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent full status line: {agent_full_status_line}")
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent HP: Current={agent_hp_current}, Max={agent_hp_max}")
    
    # Agent position and class
    if not is_agent_dead and not character_reset_event: 
        if agent_pos_reliable:
            pos_source = "(reliable)"
            if re.search(r"Yourself a (\w+)\n\(x=(\d+), y=(\d+)\)", observation_text):
                pos_source = "(from 'Yourself a [class]' indicator)."
            elif not is_active_prompt_found and cursor_x is not None:
                pos_source = "(from cursor position as current map location)." # Changed verbage
            final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent actual position: (x={agent_x}, y={agent_y}) {pos_source}")
            
            if agent_class:
                class_source = " (from status line, 'Yourself a [class]' not found or not reliable)" if not re.search(r"Yourself a (\w+)\n\(x=(\d+), y=(\d+)\)", observation_text) else " (from 'Yourself a [class]' indicator)."
                final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent class: {agent_class}{class_source}")
        else: # agent_pos_reliable is False
            cursor_info = f" Cursor visible at: (x={cursor_x}, y={cursor_y})." if cursor_x is not None else ""
            final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent actual position: Not reliably determined (during active prompt).{cursor_info}")
            if agent_class:
                final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent class: {agent_class} (from status line, 'Yourself a [class]' not found or not reliable)") # Changed verbage
    else: # Agent dead or reset
        if agent_class:
             final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent class: {agent_class} (from status line, agent dead or respawned)")
        if cursor_x is not None and cursor_y is not None:
            final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent is dead or respawned. No reliable agent map position. Cursor visible at: (x={cursor_x}, y={cursor_y}).")
        else:
            final_perceived_features.append("Agent is dead or respawned. No reliable agent map position or cursor visible.")


    # Specific agent position relative to stairs
    if agent_pos_reliable: # Only add if agent position is reliable for context
        if agent_x == known_stairs_down_location[0] and agent_y == known_stairs_down_location[1]:
            final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent is currently at the known down stairs location {known_stairs_down_location}.")
        else:
            final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent is not at the known down stairs location {known_stairs_down_location}.")


    # Message classifications and turn consumption (now that they are finalized)
    final_perceived_features.append(f"Message classifications: {', '.join(message_classifications)}.")
    final_perceived_features.append(f"Turn_consumption_status: {turn_consumed}")

    # Item related features
    if items_on_ground_explicit:
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Items explicitly on the ground: {', '.join(items_on_ground_explicit)}")
    else:
        final_perceived_features.append("No specific items explicitly found on the ground.")

    if not message_item_matches and not is_prompt and not is_invalid_action_message: 
        final_perceived_features.append("No specific item descriptions in 'letter - item_description' format found in message content to infer ground items.")
    if items_on_ground_inferred_from_message:
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Items inferred to be on the ground from message (not in inventory and not explicitly on ground): {', '.join(items_on_ground_inferred_from_message)}")

    if items_in_inventory_mentioned_in_message:
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Inventory items mentioned in message content: {', '.join(items_in_inventory_mentioned_in_message)}")
    else:
        final_perceived_features.append("No inventory items mentioned in message content.")

    if items_to_pickup:
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Items to pickup from ground (not in inventory): {', '.join(items_to_pickup)}")
        final_perceived_features.append("Suggested action: pickup (to collect items on the ground).")
    else:
        final_perceived_features.append("No items found on the ground that are not already in inventory.")
    final_perceived_features.append(f"Any_items_to_pickup_on_ground: {any_items_to_pickup_on_ground}")

    # Visible points of interest (now correctly filtered and described)
    if agent_pos_reliable and visible_points_of_interest: # Only add if agent position is reliable
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Visible points of interest: {'; '.join(visible_points_of_interest)}")
    elif not agent_pos_reliable: # If agent position is not reliable, POIs can't be absolute.
        # This message will already be covered by the agent position not reliably determined part earlier.
        # So it's fine to just omit this.
        pass
    else:
        final_perceived_features.append("No specific points of interest identified on the map (excluding terrain and known items).")

    # Stairs status and suggested action
    final_perceived_features.append(f"Stairs_explicitly_blocked_by_message (from current message): {stairs_explicitly_blocked_by_message}")
    if overall_stairs_status:
        final_perceived_features.append(overall_stairs_status)
    if suggested_stairs_action:
        final_perceived_features.append(suggested_stairs_action)

    # Prompt specific details
    if prompt_details:
        final_perceived_features.extend(prompt_details)


    return "\n".join(final_perceived_features)

import re

def perceive(observation_text: str) -> str:
    # Use a list to store output fragments that will be ordered later
    perceived_features = []

    # Initialize agent position and status
    agent_x, agent_y = None, None
    agent_pos_reliable = False
    agent_class = None
    agent_hp_current, agent_hp_max = None, None
    
    # Initialize full status line and a temporary class variable from it
    agent_full_status_line = None
    agent_class_from_status_line = None 
    
    # Initialize identified inventory items list. This will be populated from auxiliary_observation.
    identified_inventory_items_chars = set()
    identified_items_full_desc = [] # Store full descriptions for printing
    
    inventory_match = None # Initialize inventory_match for later use in final block
    
    items_on_ground_explicit = []
    items_on_ground_inferred_from_message = []
    items_in_inventory_mentioned_in_message = [] 
    items_to_pickup = [] # This will be the filtered list of truly pickable items

    # Initialize message classifications
    message_classifications = []

    # Initialize character reset event flag
    character_reset_event = False

    # --- Raw message content ---
    message_match = re.search(r"message:\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n\ncursor:|\n\nmap:|$)", observation_text)
    message_content = ""
    if message_match:
        message_content = message_match.group(1).strip()

    # --- Auxiliary Observation parsing ---
    aux_obs_content = None 
    # Updated regex to handle different auxiliary_observation formats: XML-like tags, "auxiliary_observation:\n", and "========== Start of Auxilliary Observation ==========\n"
    # It also handles different end markers: "\n\n", "\Z", "</auxiliary_observation>", and "========== End of Auxilliary Observation ==========\n"
    aux_obs_match = re.search(r"(?:<auxiliary_observation>|auxiliary_observation:\n|========== Start of Auxilliary Observation ==========\n)([\s\S]*?)(?=\n\n|\Z|</auxiliary_observation>|========== End of Auxilliary Observation ==========\n)", observation_text)
    
    if aux_obs_match:
        aux_obs_content = aux_obs_match.group(1).strip()
        
        if "You died in your previous attempt and have respawned as a new character" in aux_obs_content:
            character_reset_event = True

        inventory_match = re.search(r"inventory:\n([\s\S]+)", aux_obs_content)
        if inventory_match:
            inventory_items = inventory_match.group(1).strip().split('\n')
            for item in inventory_items:
                item_stripped = item.strip()
                # Match identified items, with or without BUC/charges
                match_ident = re.match(r"^([a-zA-Z]): .*$", item_stripped)
                if match_ident:
                    # For filtering, we still just need the character.
                    identified_inventory_items_chars.add(match_ident.group(1))
                    identified_items_full_desc.append(item_stripped)

    is_agent_dead = False
    if "Killed by" in message_content or "You die" in message_content or "You are dead" in message_content:
        is_agent_dead = True
    
    is_active_prompt_found = False
    turn_consumed = True # Default assumption for non-prompt messages and actions

    # --- Agent Status Line ---
    agent_full_status_match = re.search(r"Agent the (\w+)\s+St:.*?HP:(\d+)\((\d+)\).*?$", observation_text, re.DOTALL)
    if agent_full_status_match:
        agent_full_status_line = agent_full_status_match.group(0).strip()
        
        agent_hp_current = int(agent_full_status_match.group(2))
        agent_hp_max = int(agent_full_status_match.group(3))
        
        agent_class_from_status_line = agent_full_status_match.group(1) 

    # --- Agent Position and Class ---
    # Cursor position needed for agent position best estimate
    cursor_x, cursor_y = None, None
    cursor_match = re.search(r"cursor:\s*\n.*?\(x=(\d+), y=(\d+)\)", observation_text, re.DOTALL)
    if cursor_match:
        cursor_x = int(cursor_match.group(1))
        cursor_y = int(cursor_match.group(2))

    # --- Message Classifications (moved up to ensure is_active_prompt_found is ready early) ---
    if "What do you want to use or apply?" in message_content:
        is_active_prompt_found = True
        message_classifications.append("active_prompt (type: apply_item_selection_prompt)")
        turn_consumed = False
    elif re.search(r"In what direction\?", message_content):
        is_active_prompt_found = True
        message_classifications.append("active_prompt (type: directional_input_prompt)")
        turn_consumed = False
    elif re.search(r"What do you want to drink\? \[([a-zA-Z*? ]+)\]", message_content):
        is_active_prompt_found = True
        message_classifications.append("active_prompt (type: quaff_item_selection_prompt)")
        turn_consumed = False
    elif re.search(r"\[[ynqYNQ]+\]", message_content):
        is_active_prompt_found = True
        message_classifications.append("active_prompt (type: yes_no_quit_prompt)")
        turn_consumed = False 
    elif re.search(r"What do you want to zap\? \[([a-zA-Z*? ]+)\]", message_content):
        is_active_prompt_found = True
        message_classifications.append("active_prompt (type: zap_item_selection_prompt)")
        turn_consumed = False
    
    # Classify other specific messages that are not prompts
    if not is_active_prompt_found:
        if "You can't go down here" in message_content or "The stairs are solidly fixed to the floor" in message_content:
             message_classifications.append("blocked_stairs_message")
        if "Never mind." in message_content:
             message_classifications.append("action_cancelled_message")
        if "What?" in message_content or "Unknown command" in message_content or "I don't understand that." in message_content or "You can't do that." in message_content or "Your previous output did not contain a valid action. Retry" in message_content:
             message_classifications.append("invalid_action_message")
             turn_consumed = False 
    
    # If no specific classification has been added, and no prompt, and no item-on-ground type message, default to general_status_update
    if not message_classifications:
        message_classifications.append("general_status_update")

    # Agent Position and Class (re-evaluated after active prompt status is set)
    if not is_agent_dead and not character_reset_event: 
        agent_pos_match_class = re.search(r"Yourself a (\w+)\n\(x=(\d+), y=(\d+)\)", observation_text)
        if agent_pos_match_class:
            agent_class = agent_pos_match_class.group(1)
            agent_x = int(agent_pos_match_class.group(2))
            agent_y = int(agent_pos_match_class.group(3))
            agent_pos_reliable = True
        else: # 'Yourself a [class]' not found (e.g., during active prompt)
            if cursor_x is not None and cursor_y is not None:
                # During active prompt, cursor might not be agent's map position, but it is relevant for prompt context
                # If not a prompt, and 'Yourself a [class]' is missing, cursor is best map estimate.
                if not is_active_prompt_found: # If not an active prompt, and 'Yourself' info is missing, cursor is map pos
                    agent_x = cursor_x
                    agent_y = cursor_y
                    agent_pos_reliable = True
                else: # Active prompt, cursor is focus, agent_pos_reliable remains False
                    agent_x = cursor_x # Use for reference
                    agent_y = cursor_y # Use for reference
                
                if not agent_class and agent_class_from_status_line:
                    agent_class = agent_class_from_status_line
    else: # Agent dead or reset
        if agent_class_from_status_line:
            agent_class = agent_class_from_status_line


    # --- Map and Visible Stairs parsing ---
    map_content = ""
    map_match_obj = re.search(r"map:\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n\nAgent the \w+|$)", observation_text)
    if map_match_obj:
        map_content = map_match_obj.group(1).strip()
    
    # --- Items on Ground and Inventory from Message ---
    # Identify items explicitly on the ground (via "You see here:")
    you_see_here_match = re.search(r"You see here:\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n\ncursor:|\n\nmap:|\n\nAgent the \w+|$)", observation_text)
    chars_on_ground_explicit = set() # To help filter inferred items later
    if you_see_here_match:
        ground_content = you_see_here_match.group(1).strip()
        if ground_content:
            ground_item_matches = re.findall(r"([a-zA-Z]) - ([^\.\n]+)", ground_content)
            for char, desc in ground_item_matches:
                full_item_desc = f"{char} - {desc.strip()}"
                items_on_ground_explicit.append(full_item_desc)
                chars_on_ground_explicit.add(char)
        
    # Extract items mentioned in the message and infer their location.
    is_invalid_action_message = "invalid_action_message" in message_classifications
    is_prompt = any(cls.startswith("active_prompt") for cls in message_classifications)

    message_item_matches = []
    if message_content and not is_prompt and not is_invalid_action_message: 
        message_item_matches = re.findall(r"([a-zA-Z]) - ([^\.\n]+)", message_content)
        
        for char, desc in message_item_matches:
            candidate_item = f"{char} - {desc.strip()}"
            
            # Priority: 1. In identified inventory (from aux_obs)
            if char in identified_inventory_items_chars:
                items_in_inventory_mentioned_in_message.append(candidate_item)
            # Priority: 2. Explicitly on the ground (from "You see here:")
            elif char in chars_on_ground_explicit:
                pass # Already captured in items_on_ground_explicit
            # Priority: 3. Inferred to be on the ground (if not 1 or 2)
            else:
                items_on_ground_inferred_from_message.append(candidate_item)
        
    # Building the final `items_to_pickup` list by strictly filtering for items not in inventory
    # and ensuring uniqueness.
    potential_pickup_items_raw = []
    
    for item_desc in items_on_ground_explicit:
        char = item_desc[0]
        if char not in identified_inventory_items_chars:
            potential_pickup_items_raw.append(item_desc)
            
    for item_desc in items_on_ground_inferred_from_message:
        char = item_desc[0]
        if char not in identified_inventory_items_chars:
            potential_pickup_items_raw.append(item_desc)

    items_to_pickup = sorted(list(dict.fromkeys(potential_pickup_items_raw))) # Deduplicate and sort

    any_items_to_pickup_on_ground = bool(items_to_pickup)
    
    # Final message classification check: Add items_on_ground_message if items were found on the ground
    if (items_on_ground_explicit or items_on_ground_inferred_from_message) and "invalid_action_message" not in message_classifications \
       and not is_prompt and "blocked_stairs_message" not in message_classifications and "action_cancelled_message" not in message_classifications:
        if "general_status_update" in message_classifications:
            message_classifications.remove("general_status_update")
        message_classifications.insert(0, "items_on_ground_message")


    # --- Stairs Status and Suggested Action ---
    known_stairs_down_location = (26, 10) # Fixed in world knowledge

    stairs_present_at_down_stairs_location_map = False
    
    # Check if stairs are visibly on map at the known location, if agent position is known
    # Note: map is relative to agent if agent_x, agent_y are reliable
    # No, the map in observation is absolute. So we check directly.
    if map_content and agent_pos_reliable: # stairs only relevant if we know agent is on map
        map_lines = map_content.split('\n')
        if known_stairs_down_location[1] < len(map_lines) and \
           known_stairs_down_location[0] < len(map_lines[known_stairs_down_location[1]]):
            char_at_stairs = map_lines[known_stairs_down_location[1]][known_stairs_down_location[0]]
            if char_at_stairs == '>':
                stairs_present_at_down_stairs_location_map = True

    stairs_status_message = ""
    suggested_stairs_action = ""

    stairs_explicitly_blocked_by_message = "blocked_stairs_message" in message_classifications
    
    # Prioritize explicit blocking messages
    if stairs_explicitly_blocked_by_message:
        description_suffix = ""
        if "You can't go down here" in message_content:
            description_suffix = "due to message 'You can't go down here'."
        elif "The stairs are solidly fixed to the floor" in message_content:
            description_suffix = "due to message 'The stairs are solidly fixed to the floor'."
        stairs_status_message = f"Stairs descent status: Blocked {description_suffix} The stairs are currently impassable."
        suggested_stairs_action = "Suggested action: None (stairs are blocked)."
    elif agent_pos_reliable and agent_x == known_stairs_down_location[0] and agent_y == known_stairs_down_location[1]:
        stairs_status_message = f"Stairs descent status: Potentially traversable (agent at stairs location)."
        if any_items_to_pickup_on_ground:
            suggested_stairs_action = "Suggested action: Pickup items on the ground before attempting to descend stairs."
        else: 
            suggested_stairs_action = "Suggested action: down (to descend the stairs)."
    elif agent_pos_reliable:
        stairs_status_message = f"Stairs descent status: Not at the known down stairs location {known_stairs_down_location}."
    else:
        stairs_status_message = "Stairs descent status: Not reliably determined (agent position unknown)."


    # --- Prompt-specific details ---
    prompt_details = [] 
    if "active_prompt (type: apply_item_selection_prompt)" in message_classifications:
        choices_match = re.search(r"\[([a-zA-Z*? ]+)\]", message_content)
        if choices_match:
            prompt_details.append(f"Environment is prompting for an item selection for the 'apply' action from inventory choices: [{choices_match.group(1).strip()}].")
        else:
            prompt_details.append("Environment is prompting for an item selection for the 'apply' action.")
    elif "active_prompt (type: directional_input_prompt)" in message_classifications:
        prompt_details.append("Environment is prompting for directional input.")
    elif "active_prompt (type: quaff_item_selection_prompt)" in message_classifications:
        choices_match = re.search(r"\[([a-zA-Z*? ]+)\]", message_content)
        if choices_match: 
            prompt_details.append(f"Environment is prompting for an item selection for the 'quaff' action from inventory choices: [{choices_match.group(1).strip()}].")
        else:
            prompt_details.append("Environment is prompting for an item selection for the 'quaff' action.")
    elif "active_prompt (type: zap_item_selection_prompt)" in message_classifications:
        choices_match = re.search(r"\[([a-zA-Z*? ]+)\]", message_content)
        if choices_match: 
            prompt_details.append(f"Environment is prompting for an item selection for the 'zap' action from inventory choices: [{choices_match.group(1).strip()}].")
        else:
            prompt_details.append("Environment is prompting for an item selection for the 'zap' action.")
    elif "active_prompt (type: yes_no_quit_prompt)" in message_classifications:
        prompt_details.append(f"Environment is presenting a Yes/No/Quit prompt: '{message_content.strip()}'")


    # --- Visible Points of Interest (POI) ---
    visible_pois = []
    if map_content and agent_pos_reliable: # Only parse POI if map content is available and agent position is reliable
        map_lines = map_content.strip().split('\n')
        
        # Define common map symbols and their descriptions
        poi_symbol_descriptions = {
            '#': "A corridor or wall", # Usually walls, can be corridor in specific layouts
            '-': "Horizontal wall",
            '|': "Vertical wall",
            '+': "Closed door",
            '.': "Floor",
            '<': "Up stairs",
            '>': "Down stairs",
            '{': "Fountain or Lava",
            '~': "Sink or Moat", # Could be fountain/lava if context applies
            '=': "An anubis or another character", # Placeholder, more specific recognition would be better
            '^': "A trap",
            '[': "Armor on floor",
            '(': "Weapon on floor",
            '%': "Comestible (food) on floor",
            '?': "Scroll on floor",
            '/': "Wand on floor",
            '!': "Potion on floor",
            '$': "Gold on floor",
            '*': "A gem or rock",
            '"': "A amulet",
            '`': "A tool", # E.g., a horn
            '0': "Projectile on floor",
            'd': "Closed door", # Added 'd' explicitly as it shows up in examples
            'F': "Fountain" # Added 'F' explicitly as it shows up in examples
        }

        # Collect characters and their descriptions from the map
        for y, line in enumerate(map_lines):
            for x, char in enumerate(line):
                # Skip the agent's '@' position if it's already reported
                if agent_x is not None and agent_y is not None and x == agent_x and y == agent_y:
                    continue

                description = poi_symbol_descriptions.get(char)
                
                # Special handling for ambiguous items or unknown characters
                if char.islower() and char not in poi_symbol_descriptions: # Generic items on floor typically a-z
                    # Check if this item is also mentioned in the message, if so, use message description
                    found_in_message = False
                    for item_desc in items_on_ground_explicit + items_on_ground_inferred_from_message:
                        if item_desc.startswith(f"{char} -"):
                            description = f"{item_desc.split(' - ')[1].strip()} on floor ('{char}')"
                            found_in_message = True
                            break
                    if not found_in_message:
                        description = f"Generic item on floor ('{char}')"
                elif char.isupper() and char not in poi_symbol_descriptions: # Monsters typically A-Z
                     description = f"Monster ('{char}')"
                elif char == ':':
                    description = "A liquid ':', potentially lava or a pool. (More specific context needed)"
                elif char == '.': # Filter out generic floor tiles, unless it's a known POI like the stairs itself
                    pass
                elif char == '}': # Consolidate specific info for '}'
                    description = "Lava/Sink/Fountain ('}')"
                elif not description and char != ' ': # Unknown character that is not empty space
                    description = f"Unknown character ('{char}')"

                if description and description != "Floor": # Explicitly exclude "Floor" as a POI
                    visible_pois.append(f"{description} at (x={x}, y={y})")
    
    if not visible_pois and map_content and agent_pos_reliable: # If no specific POI but map is present, indicate
        visible_pois.append("No specific points of interest identified on the map (excluding floor tiles).")
    elif not map_content or not agent_pos_reliable:
        visible_pois.append("Agent position not reliably determined, cannot determine absolute points of interest.")

    # Rebuilding perceived_features for correct ordering
    final_perceived_features = []
    
    # Raw message content first
    final_perceived_features.append(f"Raw message content: {message_content}")

    # Auxiliary observation and character status
    if aux_obs_match:
        final_perceived_features.append("Auxiliary observation section present.")
        if character_reset_event:
            final_perceived_features.append("Character status: Respawned as a new character (death in previous attempt detected).")
        
        # Check if an inventory section was found within aux_obs_content
        if inventory_match: 
            if identified_items_full_desc:
                final_perceived_features.append(f"Identified inventory items (from auxiliary_observation): {'; '.join(identified_items_full_desc)}")
            else:
                final_perceived_features.append("Auxiliary observation contained an inventory section, but no identified items were found.")
        else: 
            final_perceived_features.append("Auxiliary observation section present, but no inventory subsection found.")
    else:
        final_perceived_features.append("No auxiliary_observation section found in the raw observation.")
    
    if is_agent_dead:
        final_perceived_features.append("Agent status: dead (death message detected).")

    # Agent status line and HP
    if agent_full_status_line:
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent full status line: {agent_full_status_line}")
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent HP: Current={agent_hp_current}, Max={agent_hp_max}")
    
    # Agent position and class
    if not is_agent_dead and not character_reset_event: 
        if agent_pos_reliable:
            final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent actual position: (x={agent_x}, y={agent_y}) (from 'Yourself a [class]' indicator).")
            final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent class: {agent_class} (from 'Yourself a [class]' indicator).")
        else: 
            if cursor_x is not None and cursor_y is not None:
                final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent actual position: Not reliably determined (during active prompt). Cursor visible at: (x={cursor_x}, y={cursor_y}).")
            else:
                final_perceived_features.append("Agent actual position: Not reliably determined (missing 'Yourself a [class]' indicator and cursor coordinates).")
            if agent_class: # If agent_class was set from status line when 'Yourself a [class]' was not found.
                final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent class: {agent_class} (from status line, 'Yourself a [class]' not found or not reliable)")
    else: 
        if agent_class:
             final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent class: {agent_class} (from status line, agent dead or respawned)")
        if cursor_x is not None and cursor_y is not None:
            final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent is dead or respawned. No reliable agent map position. Cursor visible at: (x={cursor_x}, y={cursor_y}).")
        else:
            final_perceived_features.append("Agent is dead or respawned. No reliable agent map position or cursor visible.")

    # Specific agent position relative to stairs
    if agent_pos_reliable:
        if agent_x == known_stairs_down_location[0] and agent_y == known_stairs_down_location[1]:
            final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent is currently at the known down stairs location {known_stairs_down_location}.")
        else:
            final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent is not at the known down stairs location {known_stairs_down_location}.")


    # Message classifications and turn consumption (now that they are finalized)
    final_perceived_features.append(f"Message classifications: {', '.join(message_classifications)}.")
    final_perceived_features.append(f"Turn_consumption_status: {turn_consumed}")

    # Item related features
    if items_on_ground_explicit:
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Items explicitly on the ground: {', '.join(items_on_ground_explicit)}")
    else:
        final_perceived_features.append("No specific items explicitly found on the ground.")

    if not message_item_matches and not is_prompt and not is_invalid_action_message: 
        final_perceived_features.append("No specific item descriptions in 'letter - item_description' format found in message content to infer ground items.")
    if items_on_ground_inferred_from_message:
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Items inferred to be on the ground from message (not in inventory and not explicitly on ground): {', '.join(items_on_ground_inferred_from_message)}")

    if items_in_inventory_mentioned_in_message:
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Inventory items mentioned in message content: {', '.join(items_in_inventory_mentioned_in_message)}")
    else:
        final_perceived_features.append("No inventory items mentioned in message content.")

    if items_to_pickup:
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Items to pickup from ground (not in inventory): {', '.join(items_to_pickup)}")
        final_perceived_features.append("Suggested action: pickup (to collect items on the ground).")
    else:
        final_perceived_features.append("No items found on the ground that are not already in inventory.")
    final_perceived_features.append(f"Any_items_to_pickup_on_ground: {any_items_to_pickup_on_ground}")

    # Visible Points of Interest
    if visible_pois: # Check if there are any POIs to report
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Visible points of interest: {'; '.join(sorted(list(set(visible_pois))))}") # Add sorted unique POIs
    else:
        # This case handles when map_content might be empty or unreliable, or no POIs were found at all.
        if map_content and agent_pos_reliable:
            final_perceived_features.append("No specific points of interest identified on the map (excluding floor tiles and agent position).")
        else:
            final_perceived_features.append("Agent position not reliably determined or no map content, cannot determine absolute points of interest.")

    # Stairs status and suggested action
    final_perceived_features.append(f"Stairs_explicitly_blocked_by_message (from current message): {stairs_explicitly_blocked_by_message}")
    final_perceived_features.append(stairs_status_message)
    if suggested_stairs_action:
        final_perceived_features.append(suggested_stairs_action)

    # Prompt specific details
    if prompt_details:
        final_perceived_features.extend(prompt_details)


    return "\n".join(final_perceived_features)

import re

def perceive(observation_text: str) -> str:
    # Use a list to store output fragments that will be ordered later
    perceived_features = []

    # Initialize agent position and status
    agent_x, agent_y = None, None
    agent_pos_reliable = False
    agent_class = None
    agent_hp_current, agent_hp_max = None, None
    
    # Initialize full status line and a temporary class variable from it
    agent_full_status_line = None
    agent_class_from_status_line = None 
    
    # Initialize identified inventory items list. This will be populated from auxiliary_observation.
    identified_inventory_items_chars = set()
    identified_items_full_desc = [] # Store full descriptions for printing
    
    inventory_match = None # Initialize inventory_match for later use in final block
    
    items_on_ground_explicit = []
    items_on_ground_inferred_from_message = []
    items_in_inventory_mentioned_in_message = [] 
    items_to_pickup = [] # This will be the filtered list of truly pickable items

    # Initialize message classifications
    message_classifications = []

    # Initialize character reset event flag
    character_reset_event = False

    # --- Raw message content ---
    message_match = re.search(r"message:\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n\ncursor:|\n\nmap:|$)", observation_text)
    message_content = ""
    if message_match:
        message_content = message_match.group(1).strip()

    # --- Auxiliary Observation parsing ---
    aux_obs_content = None 
    # Updated regex to handle different auxiliary_observation formats: XML-like tags, "auxiliary_observation:\n", and "========== Start of Auxilliary Observation ==========\n"
    # It also handles different end markers: "\n\n", "\Z", "</auxiliary_observation>", and "========== End of Auxilliary Observation ==========\n"
    aux_obs_match = re.search(r"(?:<auxiliary_observation>|auxiliary_observation:\n|========== Start of Auxilliary Observation ==========\n)([\s\S]*?)(?=\n\n|\Z|</auxiliary_observation>|========== End of Auxilliary Observation ==========\n)", observation_text)
    
    if aux_obs_match:
        aux_obs_content = aux_obs_match.group(1).strip()
        
        if "You died in your previous attempt and have respawned as a new character" in aux_obs_content:
            character_reset_event = True

        inventory_match = re.search(r"inventory:\n([\s\S]+)", aux_obs_content)
        if inventory_match:
            inventory_items = inventory_match.group(1).strip().split('\n')
            for item in inventory_items:
                item_stripped = item.strip()
                # Match identified items, with or without BUC/charges
                match_ident = re.match(r"^([a-zA-Z]): .*$", item_stripped)
                if match_ident:
                    # For filtering, we still just need the character.
                    identified_inventory_items_chars.add(match_ident.group(1))
                    identified_items_full_desc.append(item_stripped)

    is_agent_dead = False
    if "Killed by" in message_content or "You die" in message_content or "You are dead" in message_content:
        is_agent_dead = True
    
    is_active_prompt_found = False
    turn_consumed = True # Default assumption for non-prompt messages and actions

    # --- Agent Status Line ---
    agent_full_status_match = re.search(r"Agent the (\w+)\s+St:.*?HP:(\d+)\((\d+)\).*?$", observation_text, re.DOTALL)
    if agent_full_status_match:
        agent_full_status_line = agent_full_status_match.group(0).strip()
        
        agent_hp_current = int(agent_full_status_match.group(2))
        agent_hp_max = int(agent_full_status_match.group(3))
        
        agent_class_from_status_line = agent_full_status_match.group(1) 

    # --- Agent Position and Class ---
    # Cursor position needed for agent position best estimate
    cursor_x, cursor_y = None, None
    cursor_match = re.search(r"cursor:\s*\n.*?\(x=(\d+), y=(\d+)\)", observation_text, re.DOTALL)
    if cursor_match:
        cursor_x = int(cursor_match.group(1))
        cursor_y = int(cursor_match.group(2))

    if not is_agent_dead and not character_reset_event: 
        agent_pos_match_class = re.search(r"Yourself a (\w+)\n\(x=(\d+), y=(\d+)\)", observation_text)
        if agent_pos_match_class:
            agent_class = agent_pos_match_class.group(1)
            agent_x = int(agent_pos_match_class.group(2))
            agent_y = int(agent_pos_match_class.group(3))
            agent_pos_reliable = True
        else: # 'Yourself a [class]' not found (e.g., during active prompt)
            if cursor_x is not None and cursor_y is not None:
                agent_x = cursor_x
                agent_y = cursor_y
                if not is_active_prompt_found: # If not an active prompt, cursor is reliable map position
                    agent_pos_reliable = True
                # If an active prompt, cursor is considered focus, not reliable map position in all contexts globally
            
            # If agent_class wasn't set by "Yourself a [class]", try to set it from the status line.
            if not agent_class and agent_class_from_status_line:
                agent_class = agent_class_from_status_line
    else: # Agent dead or reset
        if agent_class_from_status_line:
            agent_class = agent_class_from_status_line

    # --- Message Classifications (moved up to ensure is_active_prompt_found is ready early) ---
    if "What do you want to use or apply?" in message_content:
        is_active_prompt_found = True
        message_classifications.append("active_prompt (type: apply_item_selection_prompt)")
        turn_consumed = False
    elif re.search(r"In what direction\?", message_content):
        is_active_prompt_found = True
        message_classifications.append("active_prompt (type: directional_input_prompt)")
        turn_consumed = False
    elif re.search(r"What do you want to drink\? \[([a-zA-Z*? ]+)\]", message_content):
        is_active_prompt_found = True
        message_classifications.append("active_prompt (type: quaff_item_selection_prompt)")
        turn_consumed = False
    elif re.search(r"\[[ynqYNQ]+\]", message_content):
        is_active_prompt_found = True
        message_classifications.append("active_prompt (type: yes_no_quit_prompt)")
        turn_consumed = False 
    elif re.search(r"What do you want to zap\? \[([a-zA-Z*? ]+)\]", message_content):
        is_active_prompt_found = True
        message_classifications.append("active_prompt (type: zap_item_selection_prompt)")
        turn_consumed = False
    
    # Classify other specific messages that are not prompts
    if not is_active_prompt_found:
        if "You can't go down here" in message_content or "The stairs are solidly fixed to the floor" in message_content:
             message_classifications.append("blocked_stairs_message")
        if "Never mind." in message_content:
             message_classifications.append("action_cancelled_message")
        if "What?" in message_content or "Unknown command" in message_content or "I don't understand that." in message_content or "You can't do that." in message_content or "Your previous output did not contain a valid action. Retry" in message_content:
             message_classifications.append("invalid_action_message")
             turn_consumed = False 
    
    # If no specific classification has been added, and no prompt, and no item-on-ground type message, default to general_status_update
    if not message_classifications:
        message_classifications.append("general_status_update")


    # --- Map and Visible Points of Interest parsing ---
    map_content = ""
    map_match = re.search(r"map:\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n\nAgent the \w+|$)", observation_text)
    visible_points_of_interest = []
    
    if map_match:
        map_content = map_match.group(1).strip()
        
        # Map of significant characters to their descriptions
        # Only include non-generic characters like floor ('.') or basic walls.
        significant_map_chars = {
            '>': 'Stairs down',
            '<': 'Stairs up',
            '}': 'Fountain or Lava', # covers both based on context
            '$': 'Gold on floor',
            'd': 'Closed door', # assuming 'd' implies closed if not described as open in message
            '(': 'Weapon on floor',
            '[': 'Armor on floor',
            ')': 'Missile weapon on floor',
            '/': 'Wand on floor',
            '?': 'Scroll on floor',
            '!': 'Potion on floor',
            '*': 'Gem or rock on floor',
            ',': 'Food on floor',
            '=': 'Ring on floor',
            '"': 'Amulet on floor',
            '`': 'Bolt/Arrow on floor', # example had '0', but Nethack uses '`' usually
            '#': 'Stone wall',
            '|': 'Vertical wall',
            '-': 'Horizontal wall',
            '+': 'Closed door (alternate)' # Often used interchangeably with 'd' or when explicitly closed
        }

        # Parse map coordinates, assuming the map starts at a relative (0,0) from its top-left corner
        map_lines = map_content.split('\n')
        map_height = len(map_lines)
        map_width = max(len(line) for line in map_lines) if map_height > 0 else 0

        # Adjust coordinates to be relative to the agent's known_stairs_down_location perspective
        # which is typically (26,10) for Dlvl:1.
        # This assumes the map view is centered around the agent or a fixed point.
        # For our purposes, we can assume observed (map_x, map_y) is reliable absolute if agent_pos_reliable.
        # However, to list *all* P.O.I. we would need coordinate offsets.
        # For now, let's keep it simple and just report found characters and their *relative* map position within the map string,
        # but also provide a note if absolute positioning is not possible.
        
        # For accurate absolute mapping, we need agent's absolute X,Y and map relative origin.
        # The prompt examples show agent x/y as the cursor position within the map.
        # Let's assume the map starts at the top-left of the provided map section in the observation.
        # If agent_pos_reliable is true, the agent's (x, y) acts as the *center* of the map or a known reference point.
        # The cursor match provides relative coordinates within the observable map itself.
        # We need to compute the absolute map coordinates for points of interest.
        
        # Let's derive map_origin_x, map_origin_y correctly.
        map_viewport_width = 80 # default Nethack viewport width
        map_viewport_height = 21 # default Nethack viewport height
        
        # If agent position is reliable, we can infer the top-left of the *visible* map section:
        if agent_pos_reliable and agent_x is not None and agent_y is not None:
            # Assuming agent is generally centered (or viewport top-left is calculable)
            # Find the agent's @ symbol on the map.
            agent_map_local_x, agent_map_local_y = None, None
            for y_local, line in enumerate(map_lines):
                if '@' in line:
                    agent_map_local_x = line.find('@')
                    agent_map_local_y = y_local
                    break

            if agent_map_local_x is not None and agent_map_local_y is not None:
                # The absolute (0,0) of the map would be:
                map_abs_origin_x = agent_x - agent_map_local_x
                map_abs_origin_y = agent_y - agent_map_local_y

                for y_local, line in enumerate(map_lines):
                    for x_local, char in enumerate(line):
                        if char == '@':
                            continue # Agent's position is handled separately

                        abs_x = map_abs_origin_x + x_local
                        abs_y = map_abs_origin_y + y_local
                        
                        if char in significant_map_chars and char != '.' and char not in ['-', '|', '#']:
                            # Only add if it's a significant item, and not a generic floor or wall character
                            visible_points_of_interest.append(f"{significant_map_chars[char]} ('{char}') at (x={abs_x}, y={abs_y})")
                        elif char == '-' or char == '|':
                             # These can be walls or open doors.
                             # If they are doors, they'd be specifically mentioned or identified by game text.
                             # For now, include them as generic 'Horizontal wall' or 'Vertical wall' if they're not special.
                             # If they were actually open doors, there's no symbol for an *open* door usually, it just becomes a '.'
                             # We'll rely on the 'd' or '+' for closed doors.
                             if char == '-' and f"{significant_map_chars['-']}" not in [poi for poi in visible_points_of_interest]: # Avoid listing all wall segments if unnecessary
                                 visible_points_of_interest.append(f"Horizontal wall ('{char}') at (x={abs_x}, y={abs_y})")
                             elif char == '|' and f"{significant_map_chars['|']}" not in [poi for poi in visible_points_of_interest]: # Avoid listing all wall segments if unnecessary
                                 visible_points_of_interest.append(f"Vertical wall ('{char}') at (x={abs_x}, y={abs_y})")
                        elif char not in significant_map_chars and char != '.' and char != ' ':
                            # Catch-all for other non-floor/space characters that are not in our significant list.
                            visible_points_of_interest.append(f"Unknown character ('{char}') at (x={abs_x}, y={abs_y})")
            else:

                if map_content: # Still parse if map content exists

    elif not map_content:

    # Identify items explicitly on the ground (via "You see here:")
    you_see_here_match = re.search(r"You see here:\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n\ncursor:|\n\nmap:|\n\nAgent the \w+|$)", observation_text)

        for char, desc in message_item_matches:
            candidate_item = f"{char} - {desc.strip()}"
            
            # Priority: 1. In identified inventory (from aux_obs)

                items_in_inventory_mentioned_in_message.append(candidate_item)

    if (items_on_ground_explicit or items_on_ground_inferred_from_message) and "invalid_action_message" not in message_classifications \

        else:

    else:

        else:
             overall_stairs_status = "Stairs descent status: Not reliably determined (agent position unknown)."
    

    # --- Prompt-specific details ---
    prompt_details = [] 
    if "active_prompt (type: apply_item_selection_prompt)" in message_classifications:
        choices_match = re.search(r"\[([a-zA-Z*? ]+)\]", message_content)
        if choices_match:
            prompt_details.append(f"Environment is prompting for an item selection for the 'apply' action from inventory choices: [{choices_match.group(1).strip()}].")
        else:
            prompt_details.append("Environment is prompting for an item selection for the 'apply' action.")
    elif "active_prompt (type: directional_input_prompt)" in message_classifications:
        prompt_details.append("Environment is prompting for directional input.")
    elif "active_prompt (type: quaff_item_selection_prompt)" in message_classifications:
        choices_match = re.search(r"\[([a-zA-Z*? ]+)\]", message_content)
        if choices_match: 
            prompt_details.append(f"Environment is prompting for an item selection for the 'quaff' action from inventory choices: [{choices_match.group(1).strip()}].")
        else:
            prompt_details.append("Environment is prompting for an item selection for the 'quaff' action.")
    elif "active_prompt (type: zap_item_selection_prompt)" in message_classifications:
        choices_match = re.search(r"\[([a-zA-Z*? ]+)\]", message_content)
        if choices_match: 
            prompt_details.append(f"Environment is prompting for an item selection for the 'zap' action from inventory choices: [{choices_match.group(1).strip()}].")
        else:
            prompt_details.append("Environment is prompting for an item selection for the 'zap' action.")
    elif "active_prompt (type: yes_no_quit_prompt)" in message_classifications:
        prompt_details.append(f"Environment is presenting a Yes/No/Quit prompt: '{message_content.strip()}'")


    # Rebuilding perceived_features for correct ordering
    final_perceived_features = []
    
    # Raw message content first
    final_perceived_features.append(f"Raw message content: {message_content}")

    # Auxiliary observation and character status
    if aux_obs_match:
        final_perceived_features.append("Auxiliary observation section present.")
        if character_reset_event:
            final_perceived_features.append("Character status: Respawned as a new character (death in previous attempt detected).")
        
        # Check if an inventory section was found within aux_obs_content
        if inventory_match: 
            if identified_items_full_desc:
                final_perceived_features.append(f"Identified inventory items (from auxiliary_observation): {'; '.join(identified_items_full_desc)}")
            else:
                final_perceived_features.append("Auxiliary observation contained an inventory section, but no identified items were found.")
        else: 
            final_perceived_features.append("Auxiliary observation section present, but no inventory subsection found.")
    else:
        final_perceived_features.append("No auxiliary_observation section found in the raw observation.")
    
    if is_agent_dead:
        final_perceived_features.append("Agent status: dead (death message detected).")

    # Agent status line and HP
    if agent_full_status_line:
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent full status line: {agent_full_status_line}")
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent HP: Current={agent_hp_current}, Max={agent_hp_max}")
    
    # Agent position and class
    if not is_agent_dead and not character_reset_event: 
        if agent_pos_reliable:
            final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent actual position: (x={agent_x}, y={agent_y}) (from 'Yourself a [class]' indicator).")
            final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent class: {agent_class} (from 'Yourself a [class]' indicator).")
        elif agent_x is not None and agent_y is not None: # Cursor position, not map reliable
            final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent actual position: Not reliably determined (during active prompt). Cursor visible at: (x={agent_x}, y={agent_y}).")
            if agent_class_from_status_line:
                final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent class: {agent_class_from_status_line} (from status line, 'Yourself a [class]' not found or not reliable)")
        else: # Neither found
            final_perceived_features.append("Agent actual position: Not reliably determined (missing 'Yourself a [class]' indicator and cursor coordinates).")
            if agent_class_from_status_line:
                final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent class: {agent_class_from_status_line} (from status line, 'Yourself a [class]' not found or not reliable)")
    else: # Agent dead or reset
        if agent_class_from_status_line:
             final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent class: {agent_class_from_status_line} (from status line, agent dead or respawned)")
        if cursor_x is not None and cursor_y is not None:
            final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent is dead or respawned. No reliable agent map position. Cursor visible at: (x={cursor_x}, y={cursor_y}).")
        else:
            final_perceived_features.append("Agent is dead or respawned. No reliable agent map position or cursor visible.")


    # Specific agent position relative to stairs
    if agent_pos_reliable:
        if agent_x == known_stairs_down_location[0] and agent_y == known_stairs_down_location[1]:
            final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent is currently at the known down stairs location {known_stairs_down_location}.")
        else:
            final_perceived_features.append(f"Agent is not at the known down stairs location {known_stairs_down_location}.")


    # Message classifications and turn consumption (now that they are finalized)
    final_perceived_features.append(f"Message classifications: {', '.join(message_classifications)}.")
    final_perceived_features.append(f"Turn_consumption_status: {turn_consumed}")

    # Item related features
    if items_on_ground_explicit:
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Items explicitly on the ground: {', '.join(items_on_ground_explicit)}")
    else:
        final_perceived_features.append("No specific items explicitly found on the ground.")

    if not message_item_matches and not is_prompt and not is_invalid_action_message: 
        final_perceived_features.append("No specific item descriptions in 'letter - item_description' format found in message content to infer ground items.")
    if items_on_ground_inferred_from_message:
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Items inferred to be on the ground from message (not in inventory and not explicitly on ground): {', '.join(items_on_ground_inferred_from_message)}")

    if items_in_inventory_mentioned_in_message:
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Inventory items mentioned in message content: {', '.join(items_in_inventory_mentioned_in_message)}")
    else:
        final_perceived_features.append("No inventory items mentioned in message content.")

    if items_to_pickup:
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Items to pickup from ground (not in inventory): {', '.join(items_to_pickup)}")
        final_perceived_features.append("Suggested action: pickup (to collect items on the ground).")
    else:
        final_perceived_features.append("No items found on the ground that are not already in inventory.")
    final_perceived_features.append(f"Any_items_to_pickup_on_ground: {any_items_to_pickup_on_ground}")

    # Visible points of interest
    if visible_points_of_interest:
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Visible points of interest: {'; '.join(visible_points_of_interest)}")
    
    # Stairs status and suggested action
    final_perceived_features.append(f"Stairs_explicitly_blocked_by_message (from current message): {stairs_explicitly_blocked_by_message}")
    if overall_stairs_status:
        final_perceived_features.append(f"Overall down stairs status: {overall_stairs_status}")
    if suggested_stairs_action:
        final_perceived_features.append(suggested_stairs_action)

    # Prompt specific details
    if prompt_details:
        final_perceived_features.extend(prompt_details)


    return "\n".join(final_perceived_features)
